name: G-5 aggregator: _universal/*.yaml loads before plugin namespace folders per the §17 G-5 ordering
command:
mkdir -p tree/_universal tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: u
rules:
  - id: g-universal-001
' > tree/_universal/u.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --emit-load-order 2>err.txt; idx_u=$(echo "$(grep -oE '"[^"]*_universal/u.yaml"' err.txt)" | head -1); idx_g=$(echo "$(grep -oE '"[^"]*google/g.yaml"' err.txt)" | head -1); [ -n "$idx_u" ] && [ -n "$idx_g" ] && echo universal_first 1>&2
